title: Northeastern University - Canada.ca
content:
## Northeastern University
You are eligible for a post-graduation work permit (PGWP) if you complete one of the degrees below and you meet all other PGWP criteria :
- Master of Professional Studies in Analytics
- Master of Professional Studies in Informatics
- Master of Science in Project Management
- Master of Science in Regulatory Affairs
- Master of Science in Cybersecurity
- Master of Science in Computer Science
- Master of Science in Information Systems
- Master of Science in Biotechnology
- Master of Science in Bioinformatics
- Master of Science in Cyber Physical Systems
- Master of Science in Data Architecture and Management
- Master of Science in Software Engineering Systems
- Master of Professional Studies in Applied AI
- Master of Professional Studies in Applied Logistics
You are not eligible if you complete any other program at this institution.
